reasoning: Order #000000587 is marked Complete and shows the item as Shipped with full payment captured. The customer claims the tracking shows Delivered but the package was not received. There is no visible shipment detail (carrier, tracking number, delivery confirmation, or signature) on the current view to verify delivery circumstances. This scenario typically requires investigation (carrier confirmation, delivery scan details, possible porch theft, or address verification) before issuing a refund. Escalating to the fulfillment/shipping team for carrier inquiry is appropriate prior to approving or denying the refund.
